Flow.description: To enable the details of actuals recorded as part of the monthly update to be displayed against a funding award
Flow.label: DESNZ - Award Actual Details

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Name","guid":"column-3f27","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Funding Award Actual Name","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Parent_Baseline_Version__c","guid":"column-2f53","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Parent Baseline Version","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Actuals_Start_Date__c","guid":"column-9c0c","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Actuals Start Date","type":"date-local"},{"apiName":"Actuals_End_Date__c","guid":"column-1529","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Actuals End Date","type":"date-local"}]
